post_title: Domain 1: Communication Is More Than Writing Essays

alt_text.domain1_communication_modes_hero_1600x90: A collage of real-world communication moments, including writing, email, conversation, asking questions, and a customer service call, connected by purple lines.
alt_text.domain1_answer_actual_question_comic_inl: A three-panel comic showing a young person first avoiding a question, then explaining context clearly, then anticipating the real question behind the conversation.
